title: Sleep-stage Kuramoto order parameter on real EEG (Sleep-EDF SC4001)
interpretation: Real single-night PSG. Observed cross-channel order parameter by stage (high->low): ['W', 'REM', 'N1', 'N2', 'N3']. Claimed: ['N3', 'W', 'N1', 'N2', 'REM']. N3 highest: False; REM lowest: False. NOTE: only 2 EEG channels in this recording, so cross-channel R is a coarse coherence proxy; a single subject is not a population test. Whatever the result, it is reported as-is: this is a genuine external check, and a partial/failed match is itself informative (the stage->regime ordering claim is at most weakly supported by one subject and should be scoped or cut).
